x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Purchase requisition volume indicates the frequency of procurement requests that AI Agents can automate through intake, routing, and approval orchestration. Adequate requisition volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist procurement capabilities.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure purchase requisitions are being submitted through SPO.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Purchase requisition volume indicates the frequency of procurement requests that AI Agents can automate through intake, routing, and approval orchestration. Adequate requisition volume maximizes the impact of Now Assist procurement capabilities.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Purchase Requisition Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_shop_purchase_requisition");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" requisitions",finding:c+" requisitions found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" requisitions",finding:c+" requisitions found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 requisitions",finding:"No requisitions found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SPO</module><number>CHK0000576</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Ensure purchase requisitions are being submitted through SPO.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Purchase Requisition Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_9ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c22</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
